inputs.label: Planned Duration (months)
inputs.businessContext: Original planned project duration in months as per baseline schedule.

businessContext_i18n.en: Original planned project duration in months as per baseline schedule.

inputs.label: Actual Duration to Date (months)
inputs.businessContext: Elapsed time since project start, used to compute schedule performance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elapsed time since project start, used to compute schedule performance.

inputs.label: Planned Total Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total budgeted cost for the project at completion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total budgeted cost for the project at completion.

inputs.label: Actual Cost Incurred (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total costs actually incurred up to the current reporting period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total costs actually incurred up to the current reporting period.

inputs.label: Percent Complete (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of work completed based on earned value or physical progress.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of work completed based on earned value or physical progress.

inputs.label: Scope Change Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of scope changes affecting project baseline. Low = 0-1 changes, Moderate = 2-4, High = 5+.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency of scope changes affecting project baseline. Low = 0-1 changes, Moderate = 2-4, High = 5+.

inputs.label: Team Experience Level
inputs.businessContext: Average experience level of the core project team.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average experience level of the core project team.

inputs.label: Quality Defect Rate (defects per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Number of defects per unit of output (e.g., per 1000 lines of code, per 100 parts).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of defects per unit of output (e.g., per 1000 lines of code, per 100 parts).

inputs.label: Supplier Reliability Index
inputs.businessContext: Probability that critical suppliers deliver on time and within spec (0 = unreliable, 1 = fully reliable).

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability that critical suppliers deliver on time and within spec (0 = unreliable, 1 = fully reliable).

inputs.label: Risk Exposure (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Monetary value of identified risks (probability * impact) not yet mitigated.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monetary value of identified risks (probability * impact) not yet mitigated.

rules.message: Actual duration exceeds planned duration. Schedule overrun is already present.
Actual cost exceeds planned total cost. Cost overrun is already present.
Percent complete must be between 0 and 100.
Quality defect rate must be between 0 and 1.
Supplier reliability index must be between 0 and 1.

thresholds.message: Schedule performance index below 0.8 – high risk of schedule overrun.
Cost performance index below 0.8 – high risk of cost overrun.
Overall overrun risk index exceeds 0.7 – immediate management attention required.

formulas.label: Schedule Performance Index (SPI)
formulas.description: Earned Value / Planned Value. Measures schedule efficiency.

formulas.label: Cost Performance Index (CPI)
formulas.description: Earned Value / Actual Cost. Measures cost efficiency.

formulas.label: Scope Change Factor
formulas.description: Quantifies impact of scope changes on risk. Low=0.8, Moderate=1.0, High=1.3.
formulas.formula: CASE scopeChangeFrequency WHEN 'low' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'moderate' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1.3 END

formulas.label: Team Experience Factor
formulas.description: Adjusts risk based on team experience. Junior=1.3, Intermediate=1.0, Senior=0.8.
formulas.formula: CASE teamExperience WHEN 'junior' THEN 1.3 WHEN 'intermediate' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'senior' THEN 0.8 END

formulas.label: Quality & Supply Risk Multiplier
formulas.description: Combined effect of defect rate and supplier reliability on overrun risk.

formulas.label: Overrun Risk Index (ORI)
formulas.description: Primary composite risk index combining schedule, cost, scope, team, quality, and risk exposure.
formulas.formula: ( (1 - schedulePerformanceIndex) + (1 - costPerformanceIndex) ) / 2 * scopeChangeFactor * teamExperienceFactor * qualityAndSupplyRisk + (riskExposure / plannedCost)

formulas.label: Data Confidence Adjusted ORI
formulas.description: Adjusts ORI based on data completeness and reliability (simulated confidence factor).

primary.label: Overrun Risk Index (ORI)
primary.description: Primary composite risk index for project overrun. Values >0.7 indicate high risk.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Schedule Slippage
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Hidden driver: cumulative delay not captured by SPI alone (e.g., critical path delays).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Rework Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Hidden driver: cost of rework due to defects, often underestimated.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Scope Creep
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Hidden driver: unapproved scope additions that increase cost and schedule.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Resource Attrition
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Hidden driver: loss of key personnel leading to productivity drops.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Earned Value Management (EVM)
suggestedActions.description: Adopt EVM to track SPI and CPI monthly, enabling early corrective actions.

suggestedActions.label: Scope Change Control Board
suggestedActions.description: Establish a formal change control board to evaluate and approve scope changes.

suggestedActions.label: Quality Improvement Program
suggestedActions.description: Launch Six Sigma DMAIC project to reduce defect rate by 50% within 3 months.

suggestedActions.label: Supplier Development Initiative
suggestedActions.description: Work with critical suppliers to improve reliability index to >0.95 through audits and training.

suggestedActions.label: Risk Mitigation Reserve
suggestedActions.description: Allocate contingency reserve equal to 10% of planned cost for identified risks.
